column1: #   ADD_UNOFFICIAL       - Mark differing clades with UNOFFICIAL (standard behavior)
#   SUPPRESS_UNOFFICIAL  - Use phyloname as-is, no UNOFFICIAL marking
# These overrides assign meaningful Kingdom names to species that NCBI
# places in numbered/unnamed higher clades. The Kingdom assignment
# (Holozoa vs Holomycota) follows current phylogenetic understanding.
# Holozoa: Ichthyosporea, Filasterea, Choanoflagellata (sister to Metazoa)
